SESSION.EXPIRED_BODY: Your session has expired. Please log in again to continue.

ZONES.TITLE: DNS Zones
ZONES.SUBTITLE: {{ count }} zone(s) configured
ZONES.CIDR_HELP: IPv4 : /8, /16 or /24 generated. IPv6 : corresponding zone nibble.
ZONES.NAMESERVERS_HELP: Separated by commas. The first server will be the mname of the SOA.

ZONE_DETAIL.MEMBERS_NO_ACCOUNT_TOOLTIP: Associate this zone with an account to manage its members
ZONE_DETAIL.DNSSEC_HELP: Generate a KSK or CSK key to enable DNSSEC on this zone
ZONE_DETAIL.TRANSFER_DESC: Configuration of the zone transfer (AXFR). For dynamic updates, use the DNS Update tab.
ZONE_DETAIL.ALLOW_AXFR_FROM: IP addresses/networks allowed to receive the zone
ZONE_DETAIL.ALLOW_AXFR_FROM_HELP: CIDR format (e.g., 192.168.1.0/24, 2001:db8::/32). Prefix with ! to exclude an address. Leave empty to allow everyone.
ZONE_DETAIL.NO_AXFR_RESTRICTION: No restriction — AXFR allowed from any address
ZONE_DETAIL.TSIG_ALLOW_AXFR_HELP: The secondary servers will need to present one of these keys during the transfer.
ZONE_DETAIL.ALL_TSIG_ASSIGNED: All available TSIG keys are already assigned.
ZONE_DETAIL.ALSO_NOTIFY_HELP: In addition to the NS servers of the zone, PowerDNS will send NOTIFY packets to these addresses.
ZONE_DETAIL.AXFR_MASTER_TSIG: TSIG key to use for the incoming AXFR transfer
ZONE_DETAIL.AXFR_MASTER_TSIG_HELP: This key will be presented to the master server during the incoming zone transfer.
ZONE_DETAIL.AXFR_SOURCE_HELP: Local IP address to use as the source for outgoing AXFR connections. Leave empty to use the default.
ZONE_DETAIL.DNSUPDATE_DESC: Configure the TSIG keys and/or IP restrictions that allow clients to dynamically update the DNS records for this zone.
ZONE_DETAIL.TSIG_ALLOW_DNSUPDATE_HELP: Only clients presenting one of these keys will be able to submit dynamic updates.
ZONE_DETAIL.ALLOW_DNSUPDATE_FROM: IP addresses allowed for dynamic updates
ZONE_DETAIL.ALLOW_DNSUPDATE_FROM_HELP: Restrict dynamic updates to certain address ranges (CIDR format). If empty and no TSIG key, updates will be rejected.
ZONE_DETAIL.FORWARD_DNSUPDATE: Transfer dynamic updates to the master
ZONE_DETAIL.FORWARD_DNSUPDATE_HELP: IP address of the master server to forward dynamic updates. Leave empty to disable.
ZONE_DETAIL.MASTER_SERVERS_HELP: Required for Slave zones. Separate with commas.
ZONE_DETAIL.AUTO_PTR_HELP: When an A or AAAA record is added, the corresponding PTR record is automatically created in the appropriate reverse zone.
ZONE_DETAIL.RECORD_TYPES_DESC: Select the types proposed when creating or modifying records in this zone.
ZONE_DETAIL.NO_TYPES: No types available for this zone type.
ZONE_DETAIL.PTR_AUTO_CREATED: PTR created automatically in reverse zone
ZONE_DETAIL.NO_REVERSE_ZONE: No reverse zone found for this address — PTR not created.
ZONE_DETAIL.ACCOUNT_HELP: Allows you to group zones by account/organization.
ZONE_DETAIL.API_KEYS_EMPTY: No API or ACME keys are associated with this zone.
ZONE_DETAIL.EMAIL_DKIM_NONE_HELP: No DKIM key found (no *._domainkey record). Configure DKIM in your mail server.

ACCOUNTS.TITLE: Accounts
ACCOUNTS.SUBTITLE: DNS zone management spaces
ACCOUNTS.NO_ACCOUNTS_HELP: Accounts correspond to the account attribute of PowerDNS zones
ACCOUNTS.ZONES_HELP: Check the zones to associate with this account. A zone already linked to another account is highlighted in yellow.
ACCOUNTS.NAME_HELP: Must correspond to the account attribute of PowerDNS zones
ACCOUNTS.ASSIGN_HELP: Check the users who should manage the zones of this account.
ACCOUNTS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete the account {{ name }} ? The associated zones in PowerDNS will not be deleted.

AUDIT.TITLE: Audit log
AUDIT.SUBTITLE: History of actions and logs from the PowerDNS server
AUDIT.PDNS_NO_LOGS: No logs available via the PowerDNS API
AUDIT.PDNS_RING_EMPTY: The ring buffer logmessages is empty or not supported.

OIDC.TITLE: OIDC/SSO configuration
OIDC.SUBTITLE: Configuration of OpenID Connect authentication
OIDC.SAVED: Configuration saved. The new settings are active immediately.
OIDC.ACTIVATE_SSO_HELP: Allows login via an OpenID Connect provider
OIDC.DISABLE_LOCAL_HELP: Forces users to login only via SSO
OIDC.DISCOVERY_URL_HELP: URL of the OpenID Connect discovery document of your provider
OIDC.REDIRECT_URI_HELP: Must be registered in your OIDC provider

RECORD_TYPES.TITLE: DNS Record Types
RECORD_TYPES.SUBTITLE: Define the types available when creating records
RECORD_TYPES.DELETE_HELP: Zones with this type selected will need to be updated manually.

USERS.TITLE: Users
USERS.SUBTITLE: {{ count }} user(s) registered
USERS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Delete the user {{ username }} ? This action is irreversible.

AUTOPRIMARIES.TITLE: Autoprimaries
AUTOPRIMARIES.SUBTITLE: Authoritative DNS servers allowed to automatically create secondary zones
AUTOPRIMARIES.NO_AUTOPRIMARIES_HELP: Autoprimaries allow automatic creation of secondary zones.
AUTOPRIMARIES.ACCOUNT_HELP: Associated account for filtering automatically created secondary zones.

CATALOGUES.TITLE: DNS catalogs
CATALOGUES.SUBTITLE: {{ count }} catalogue(s) configured
CATALOGUES.SELECT_CATALOG: Select a catalogue to manage its members

NETWORKS.TITLE: Networks
NETWORKS.SUBTITLE: Network association → DNS view (split-horizon)
NETWORKS.NO_NETWORKS_HELP: Associate network ranges with DNS views for split-horizon.

PROFILE.TITLE: Profile
PROFILE.SUBTITLE: Manage your preferences and security
PROFILE.APPEARANCE_HELP: Choose the theme for the interface.

SEARCH.TITLE: Global search
SEARCH.SUBTITLE: Zones, DNS records and comments
SEARCH.RESULTS: {{ total }} result(s) — {{ zones }} zone(s), {{ records }} record(s), {{ comments }} comment(s)
SEARCH.WILDCARD_HELP: Use * as a multi-character wildcard, ? for a single character.

APIKEYS.TITLE: My API Keys
APIKEYS.SUBTITLE: PowerDNS UI API access keys and ACME keys for Certbot
APIKEYS.NO_KEYS_HELP: Create an API key to access the API, or an ACME key for Certbot DNS-01 challenges.
APIKEYS.TYPE_API_DESC: Access the PowerDNS UI API via the X-API-Key header. Same permissions as your account.
APIKEYS.TYPE_ACME_DESC: For Certbot (certbot-dns-pdns). Scoped to allowed zones and _acme-challenge records only.
APIKEYS.NAME_HELP: A descriptive name to identify this key (e.g. traefik-prod)
APIKEYS.SECRET_HELP: If left blank, a random secret will be generated. You can provide your own key.
APIKEYS.KEY_ONCE_WARNING: Copy this key now — it will not be shown again.
APIKEYS.API_CREDENTIALS_HINT: Use this key in your HTTP request header:
APIKEYS.CERTBOT_CREDENTIALS_HINT: Paste it into your Certbot credentials file:
APIKEYS.ZONES_HELP: Select the zones this key may modify (only _acme-challenge records).
APIKEYS.ADMIN_SUBTITLE: Overview of all users' API and ACME keys
APIKEYS.COMMENT_PLACEHOLDER: Short description of this key's purpose…
APIKEYS.COMMENT_HELP: Optional note to help you identify the use of this key.

TSIGKEYS.TITLE: TSIG Keys
TSIGKEYS.SUBTITLE: Authentication of zone transfers (AXFR) and DNS updates
TSIGKEYS.NO_KEYS_HELP: TSIG keys secure zone transfers and DNS updates between DNS servers.
TSIGKEYS.SECRET_HELP: If left blank, the server will generate a random secret automatically.
TSIGKEYS.NAME_PATTERN: The name may only contain letters, digits, hyphens, dots and underscores (no spaces, accents or special characters).
TSIGKEYS.NAME_HELP: Letters, digits, hyphens and dots only (e.g. my-tsig-key)

VIEWS.TITLE: DNS Views
VIEWS.SUBTITLE: Split-horizon — association zones → DNS views
VIEWS.NO_VIEWS_HELP: DNS views allow you to serve different zones based on the origin of the requests.
VIEWS.SELECT_VIEW: Select a view to see its zones
VIEWS.FIRST_ZONE_HELP: A view must contain at least one zone to be created.
